description: Analyzes conversation links and classifies them as working examples, broken examples, or unknown

initialize.description: Called when the app loads in the Inbox sidebar

submit.description: Called when user interacts with the app

setup_notes: 1. Register this app in the Intercom Developer Hub
2. Set the webhook URLs to point to your FastAPI backend
3. Enable conversation-context capability to receive conversation_id
4. Install the app in your Intercom workspace
